value.found_quote: To define your own custom agents, add standalone TOML files under `~/.codex/agents/` for personal agents or `.codex/agents/` for project-scoped agents.
value.rationale: The page describes custom agents within Codex's subagent workflows, explicitly stating users can define their own custom agents with different model configurations and instructions via standalone TOML files. The schema includes fields like model, model_reasoning_effort, and developer_instructions, matching the claim. The feature is described as enabled by default in current releases.
